name: Light Pill #6 - The Truth Speaker
description: The Truth Speaker - A glowing capsule that reveals unspoken truths and gives voice to hidden realities. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Crimson robes with golden truth runes embroidered throughout
Burning scroll that reveals secrets when held to light
Gold-sandaled feet that leave glowing embers
Ancient temple with floating obsidian pillars
Some truths burn so brightly they cannot be unseen once spoken.
You must speak three truths that you have never voiced aloud - one that liberates you, one that terrifies you, and one that could change everything. The flames will judge their purity.
Must be taken while holding a burning candle

properties.ai_prompt: Powerful fashion editorial of The Truth Speaker in an ancient temple with floating obsidian pillars, wearing crimson robes with glowing golden truth runes, holding a burning scroll that reveals secrets in the firelight. Scarlet Flame aura with Burning Bright energy, gold sandals leaving ember trails, cinematic lighting that makes the flames cast dramatic shadows revealing hidden truths in the temple walls, 8K, hyperdetailed with fire effects and glowing runes.
